settings.zoom.label: Wallpaper Zoom
settings.zoom.desc: Scale of the wallpaper to provide room for parallax movement
settings.direction.label: Parallax Direction
settings.direction.desc: Which direction the wallpaper shifts when changing workspaces
settings.horizontal.title: Horizontal Parallax
settings.vertical.title: Vertical Parallax
settings.invert.label: Invert Direction
settings.invert.desc: Move the wallpaper in the same direction as workspace changes
settings.autoZoom.label: Auto Zoom
settings.autoZoom.desc: Automatically and progressively zoom to prevent background layer from showing
settings.easing.label: Easing Curve
settings.easing.desc: The mathematical curve used for parallax animations
